prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年辽宁大学在海南省综合类最低录取位次分别为约4302名→4965名→5945名→4713名→6697名，整体呈波动上升趋势，近两年波动幅度加大；2025年基准位 次约6697名，为近五年最高位次；该校在海南省综合类招生计划2021年15人、2022年13人、2023年12人、2024年13人、2025年13人；2026年计划仍为13人 ，与2025年持平，计划稳定未对竞争产生额外影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 辽宁大学为国家211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第125名，近年排名稳定在120–130 区间，属于中游偏上211院校；该校近年声誉平稳，未出现明显负面舆情或投档线异常断档记录；抖音学校热度总排名第105位，评价为“一般”，短视频平台曝光 度较低，报考关注度相对平稳；第五轮学科评估中，应用经济学获评A-，为该校唯一A-及以上学科，与招生专业中的国际经济与贸易高度关联；会计学、工商管 理类等经管类专业受益于该学科优势，具有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度数据显示：会计/财务/审计类为“推荐”，金融/财经/经济类为“分化观望”，新闻传播类为“明显劝退”；该校招生专业中会计学热度较高、新闻学热度较低，整体专业热度分化。海南省2026年考生总数约78000人，较2025年67408人增长约15.7%，竞争显著加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动上行趋势、2026年招生计划持平、海南省考生规模大幅增长（+15.7%）导致竞争加剧，以及学校声誉平稳、专业热 度分化等因素，预计2026年辽宁大学在海南省综合类最低录取位次在2025年基准6697名基础上小幅上升（更难进）；预测最低位次约6747名，波动区间6247–7247名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 会计学
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等难度）
- 档案学
- 国际经济与贸易
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

- 工商管理类（工商管理、人力资源管理、市场营销）
- 新闻学
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约6747名，区间6247–7247名。位次在区间下限附近（6247名以内）可重点冲刺一档会计学专业；位次在区间中段（6500–7000名）以二档档案学、国际经济与贸易为主 力选择；位次在区间上限附近（7000名以外）建议以三档工商管理类、新闻学保底。会计学热度较高、竞争激烈，新闻学社会热度明显劝退，报考时需结合个人兴趣与就业预期综 合判断。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Liaoning University in Hainan Province's comprehensive category were approximately 4302 → 4965 → 5945 → 4713 → 6697, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend with increased volatility in recent years; the 2025 baseline ranking is about 6697, the highest in the past five years; the university's enrollment plan in Hainan's comprehensive category was 15 in 2021, 13 in 2022, 12 in 2023, 13 in 2024, and 13 in 2025; the 2026 plan remains 13, unchanged from 2025, with a stable plan not exerting additional competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Liaoning University is a national Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks approximately 125th, with recent rankings stable in the 120–130 range, placing it among mid-to-upper tier 211 institutions; its reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion or abnormal cutoff score gaps; its Douyin school popularity ranks 105th overall, rated as 'average', with low exposure on short video platforms and relatively stable application attention; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Applied Economics received an A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university, highly related to the International Economics and Trade major in its enrollment; accounting, business administration, and other economics and management majors benefit from this disciplinary advantage, offering some appeal.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity data shows: Accounting/Finance/Auditing categories are 'recommended', Finance/Economics categories are 'differentiated and wait-and-see', and Journalism/Communication categories are 'clearly discouraged'; among the university's enrollment majors, accounting has high popularity while journalism has low popularity, resulting in overall major popularity divergence. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Hainan Province is approximately 78,000, an increase of about 15.7% from 67,408 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating upward trend in historical rankings, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the significant increase in Hainan Province's examinee population (+15.7%) leading to intensified competition, along with stable university reputation and diverging major popularity, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Liaoning University in Hainan's comprehensive category in 2026 will slightly rise (harder to enter) from the 2025 baseline of 6697; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 6747, with a fluctuation range of 6247–7247.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate Difficulty)
- Archival Science
- International Economics and Trade
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Business Administration (Business Administration, Human Resource Management, Marketing)
- Journalism
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 6747, with a range of 6247–7247. Candidates with rankings near the lower bound (within 6247) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 Accounting; those with rankings in the mid-range (6500–7000) should consider Tier 2 Archival Science and International Economics and Trade as primary choices; candidates with rankings near the upper bound (outside 7000) are advised to use Tier 3 Business Administration and Journalism as safety options. Accounting has high popularity and fierce competition, while Journalism has significantly discouraged social popularity; applicants should make comprehensive judgments based on personal interests and employment expectations.
